summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'The Adventures of Arky Allogist Ant' book launch website. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with correct page title
Hero section displays book cover image
Blue Amazon CTA buttons present and styled correctly
Navigation menu has all required links (About, Chapters, Author, Dedication)
All 8 chapters displayed in Chapters section
All 8 Crunch Bunch names visible in Dedication section
Contact form integration with backend working
Open Graph meta tags present for iPhone sharing
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (10/10 tests passed), Integration: 100% (contact form working perfectly)
